steps.title: Identify the signal in context
steps.content: The strongest signal is: “He avoided the clubs and usually dined alone at his hotel.” This shows Alexander had no downtime or social breaks — his time was entirely devoted to work.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Given this context, “constantly” must mean continuously, without interruption. Nonstop directly expresses this meaning. The others don't fit: they describe speed, emotion, or quantity—not continuous work.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
